description: Animate moving a text object from its current position to a new destination. Both source and destination can be any text object (write, print, label) or selection. The actual object moves, not a copy. Clicking the mutator icon opens the Explorer side panel with full AsciiMath editing, live preview, and symbol picker.
utility: Animate moving any text object or selection to another position

arguments.name: destination
arguments.description: Target position — any text object or selection to use as anchor

arguments.name: source
arguments.description: Any text object or selection to move (write, print, label, or select result)

alternates.description: Move source to a selection's position
Move a selection to destination's position

examples.scenario: Move b value into equation for Pythagorean theorem
Move denominator value during equation solving
